criteria_verification.criterion_text: `infrastructure.logging.configure("INFO")` produces JSON-formatted events on a pipe, console-formatted on a TTY.
criteria_verification.evidence: configure() detects sys.stderr.isatty() and selects JSONRenderer (pipe) or ConsoleRenderer (TTY). Tests test_configure_json_on_pipe and test_configure_console_on_tty verify JSON-parseable output on non-TTY and non-JSON console output on TTY respectively. test_configure_sets_log_level verifies log level filtering.
criteria_verification.notes: configure() detects sys.stderr.isatty() and selects JSONRenderer (pipe) or ConsoleRenderer (TTY). Tests test_configure_json_on_pipe and test_configure_console_on_tty verify JSON-parseable output on non-TTY and non-JSON console output on TTY respectively. test_configure_sets_log_level verifies log level filtering.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: A log event emitted with `config.model_dump()` as payload redacts all `*_key` and `*_token` values (literal secret values must not appear in the emitted event).
criteria_verification.evidence: _redact_secrets processor masks top-level and nested dict keys ending _key or _token with '***'. Tests test_redact_api_key_fields, test_redact_token_fields, test_redact_nested_dict_keys, and test_redact_config_model_dump all assert literal secret values do not appear in captured log output.
criteria_verification.notes: _redact_secrets processor masks top-level and nested dict keys ending _key or _token with '***'. Tests test_redact_api_key_fields, test_redact_token_fields, test_redact_nested_dict_keys, and test_redact_config_model_dump all assert literal secret values do not appear in captured log output.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: `startup()` raises `ConfigurationError` with the configured logging system already emitting structured events (i.e., the error is logged as a structured event before being re-raised).
criteria_verification.evidence: startup() calls configure(config.log_level) as its first operation, then validate_provider_keys(). On ConfigurationError, it logs the error via structlog before re-raising. Tests test_startup_raises_configuration_error_with_logging verifies logging output is non-empty when error is raised. test_startup_configures_logging_before_validation uses mock call ordering to prove configure() runs before validate_provider_keys().
criteria_verification.notes: startup() calls configure(config.log_level) as its first operation, then validate_provider_keys(). On ConfigurationError, it logs the error via structlog before re-raising. Tests test_startup_raises_configuration_error_with_logging verifies logging output is non-empty when error is raised. test_startup_configures_logging_before_validation uses mock call ordering to prove configure() runs before validate_provider_keys().

criteria_verification.criterion_text: `shutdown(state)` is idempotent — calling it twice does not raise.
criteria_verification.evidence: shutdown() wraps all teardown logic in try/except with warning logging. Tests test_shutdown_does_not_raise, test_shutdown_idempotent (calls twice), and test_shutdown_logs_clean_shutdown all verify no exceptions and structured log output.
criteria_verification.notes: shutdown() wraps all teardown logic in try/except with warning logging. Tests test_shutdown_does_not_raise, test_shutdown_idempotent (calls twice), and test_shutdown_logs_clean_shutdown all verify no exceptions and structured log output.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: All modified files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero errors.
criteria_verification.evidence: ruff check and ruff format --check both pass with zero errors on all 4 files (src/jarvis/infrastructure/__init__.py, logging.py, lifecycle.py, tests/test_infrastructure.py). py_compile passes for all files.
criteria_verification.notes: ruff check and ruff format --check both pass with zero errors on all 4 files (src/jarvis/infrastructure/__init__.py, logging.py, lifecycle.py, tests/test_infrastructure.py). py_compile passes for all files.
